ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 'sleep 35 && cd /home/jose/moreno-ai && python3 -c "
import json, datetime
from pathlib import Path
JOB = \"phase9e10-runtime-candidate-20260621T203012Z-03cfe2\"
WS = Path(\"memory/execution-pipeline/governed\") / JOB / \"_background\" / \"bg-20260623T214307Z-6d9d9afc\"
print(\"=STATE=\")
d = json.loads((WS / \"run-state.json\").read_text())
print(\"status:\", d.get(\"status\"))
print(\"wave11_version:\", d.get(\"wave11_version\"))
print(\"\n=LIVENESS HB=\")
hb_p = WS / \"heartbeat-liveness.json\"
if hb_p.is_file():
    hb = json.loads(hb_p.read_text())
    print(\"ts:\", hb.get(\"ts\"))
    print(\"stage:\", hb.get(\"stage\"))
    print(\"hb_count:\", hb.get(\"hb_count\"))
    print(\"wave11_version:\", hb.get(\"wave11_version\"))
else:
    print(\"none yet\")
print(\"\n=STREAM ACTIVITY=\")
sa_p = WS / \"stream-activity.json\"
if sa_p.is_file():
    sa = json.loads(sa_p.read_text())
    print(\"status:\", sa.get(\"status\"))
    print(\"model:\", sa.get(\"model\"))
    print(\"started_at:\", sa.get(\"model_request_started_at\"))
else:
    print(\"none yet\")
print(\"\n=LEDGER=\")
led_p = WS / \"event-ledger.ndjson\"
if led_p.is_file():
    lines = led_p.read_text().strip().split(\"\n\")
    for l in lines[-6:]: print(l)
print(\"\n=PID=\")
import subprocess; r = subprocess.run([\"kill\",\"-0\",\"75128\"], capture_output=True); print(\"ALIVE\" if r.returncode==0 else \"DEAD\")
print(\"\n=WORKER LOG=\")
log_p = WS / \"worker.log\"
if log_p.is_file() and log_p.stat().st_size > 0: print(log_p.read_text()[-500:])
else: print(\"empty\")
" 2>&1'
